title: The Sun Rises in the East
original_title: The Sun Rises in the East
overview: The Sun Rises in The East chronicles the birth, rise and legacy of The East, a pan-African cultural organization founded in 1969 by teens and young adults in Bedford-Stuyvesant, Brooklyn.
